description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single analysis stage using the ciricihq/gitlab-sonar-scanner Docker image. Add a sonarqube job in the analysis stage that runs /usr/bin/sonar-scanner-run.sh and sets SONAR_ANALYSIS_MODE=issues, SONAR_PROJECT_VERSION=$CI_BUILD_ID, SONAR_URL=https://www.krusher.duckdns.org. Add a sonarqube-reports job in the same stage that runs unset CI_BUILD_REF && /usr/bin/sonar-scanner-run.sh and sets SONAR_ANALYSIS_MODE=publish, SONAR_PROJECT_VERSION=$CI_BUILD_ID, SONAR_URL=https://www.krusher.duckdns.org. No caches, artifacts, or conditional rules are defined.
